section.heading: Army Reserve: composition

content.p: The Army Reserve includes all Reserves of the Army who are not members of the Army National Guard of the United States.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1661(a)(1), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 2970.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 3076 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
